data_description.allow_insecure: Disable HTTPS certificate verification for a self-signed Immich. Leave off unless you understand the risk.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Immich. Check the URL and that the server is reachable.
error.invalid_auth: Immich rejected the API key or album. Check the API key and album ID.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the Home Assistant log.

abort.already_configured: This Immich album is already configured.

data_description.remove_to_album_id: Assets removed from the source album are added here first as a fail-safe before deletion. Requires albumAsset.create/delete and album.read scopes on the API key; asset.update is needed for ratings.
